title: A New Compilation Celebrates the Futuristic Rave Music of the Late Colin Ward
author: people/sam-goldner
body:
# A New Compilation Celebrates the Futuristic Rave Music of the Late Colin Ward

Posthumous Bandcamp Daily feature on Colin's body of work, timed to the release of *Neotropical* (Noumenal Loom, April 3, 2020).

**Publication:** Bandcamp Daily  
**Author:** Sam Goldner  
**Date:** 2020-04-10  
**URL:** https://daily.bandcamp.com/features/colin-ward-interview  

Full scraped text is at `_Documentation/articles/2020-04-10_bandcampdaily_colin-ward-feature.md`.

## Key details (confirmed 2026-04-22)

- **Isabel Barnes** of Noumenal Loom assembled the compilation; quoted in the piece. See [[people/isabel-barnes]].
- Colin released music under: Killd By, alphabets, DJ POoLsiDe, Bangplay, phonebooks.
- "More than forty albums between 2008 and 2013, releasing a new piece of work every three or four months" — corroborates the album-a-month project's documented scope.
- This is the longest-form posthumous Colin Ward profile with national-scale readership.
